headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace launches next-generation data analytics platform

sentiment.reasoning: A new product launch can drive revenue growth and market share, but its immediate financial impact and long-term success are subject to market adoption.

headlines.headline: Nolvav Commerce announces $0.8B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A significant share buyback program typically signals management confidence and can boost shareholder value by reducing the number of outstanding shares.

headlines.headline: Nolvav Commerce sees 15% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A significant drop in new customer orders directly indicates weakening demand, which will negatively impact future revenue and earnings.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
